_comment: RunPod pod template definition for comfyui-provisioner. Use this as a reference for the runpodctl create pod command or the RunPod web UI. See providers/runpod/README.md for the full walkthrough.
_usage: runpodctl create pod --name comfyui-mystack --imageName yanwk/comfyui-boot:cu124-slim --containerDiskInGb 100 --volumeInGb 0 --volumeMountPath /workspace --ports '8188/http,22/tcp' --gpuType 'NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090' --gpuCount 1 --minMemoryInGb 24 --env 'PUBLIC_KEY=<SSH_PUBLIC_KEY>' --env 'HF_TOKEN=<REPLACE_ME>' --env 'STACK_REPO=owner/your-stack' --env 'GH_TOKEN=<REPLACE_ME>' --containerStartCommand 'bash -c "curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ismail-kattakath/comfyui-provisioner/main/providers/runpod/onstart.sh | bash"'

env.PUBLIC_KEY: REPLACE_ME — your SSH public key (contents of ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub)
env.STACK_REPO: REPLACE_ME — owner/repo of your stack (e.g. owner/comfyui-stack-example)
env.GH_TOKEN: REPLACE_ME_OR_OMIT — GitHub PAT with repo read scope (required for private stacks)
env.CIVITAI_API_KEY: REPLACE_ME_OR_OMIT — Civitai API key (required if stack downloads Civitai LoRAs)
env.SYNCTHING_PEER_DEVICE_ID: REPLACE_ME_OR_OMIT — your laptop's Syncthing device ID for workflow auto-pair

notes: ComfyUI is accessible at https://<pod-id>-8188.proxy.runpod.net once provisioning completes (~12-20 min on first boot).
SSH: ssh root@<PUBLIC_IP> -p <RUNPOD_TCP_PORT_22>  (find port with: runpodctl get pod <id>)
The yanwk/comfyui-boot:cu124-slim image installs ComfyUI at /root/ComfyUI. The provisioner's COMFYUI_DIR auto-detection covers this path via the ~/comfyui candidate.
Volumes: RunPod network volumes mount at /workspace. Pass --networkVolumeId <id> to runpodctl for persistence.

Cloudflare limitation: the RunPod HTTP proxy has a 100-second timeout on proxied ports. Long-running inference jobs that exceed 100s will appear to hang in the browser. Use the direct TCP port (22) for SSH or poll the API from a client that isn't behind Cloudflare.
